tiers.label: Source-published NPI, NPPES-verified
tiers.description: the excluding agency printed an NPI and the CMS NPPES registry confirms the identity

tiers.label: Unique identity match (name+state)
tiers.description: exactly one provider in the national registry shares the normalized name and state

tiers.label: Unique identity match via registered alias
tiers.description: same, matched through a registered maiden/former/dba name

tiers.label: License-number corroborated
tiers.description: the state license number on the exclusion agrees with the registry

tiers.label: AI-adjudicated, human review required
tiers.description: a large language model weighed the remaining evidence; reasoning stored, every verdict flagged for human review
